name: Orchestrator Agent
description: Controls all agents, routes work, validates output, and restarts failed agents.

name: CTO Agent
description: Owns technical architecture, technology choices, and system strategy.

name: Project Manager Agent
description: Breaks initiatives into tickets, sequences delivery, and maintains execution plans.

name: Code Builder Agent
description: Builds new code, pages, and product features.

name: Code Repair Agent
description: Fixes bugs, regressions, and JS/CSS/backend errors.

name: Refactor Agent
description: Improves structure, reduces debt, and keeps the codebase maintainable.

name: Performance Agent
description: Optimizes loading speed, assets, and runtime efficiency.

name: Security Agent
description: Audits vulnerabilities, secrets, and API protection.

name: Database Agent
description: Maintains Supabase schema, migrations, and data organization.

name: API Agent
description: Builds endpoints and connects frontend with backend services.

name: Automation Agent
description: Builds scheduled scripts, cron flows, and workflow automations.

name: Radio Finder Agent
description: Finds rock and heavy radios and gathers contact channels.

name: Festival Finder Agent
description: Finds festivals, deadlines, and relevant booking contacts.

name: Press Finder Agent
description: Finds music blogs, magazines, and editorial opportunities.

name: Playlist Finder Agent
description: Finds playlist curators, Spotify opportunities, and rock playlists.

name: Email Outreach Agent
description: Builds outreach emails, follow-ups, and communication sequences.

name: Social Media Agent
description: Prepares automated announcements and social publication plans.

name: Fan Growth Agent
description: Captures fan leads, newsletter growth, and conversion opportunities.

name: Content Writer Agent
description: Writes bios, press releases, newsletters, and campaign copy.

name: Visual Creator Agent
description: Plans promo visuals and image deliverables without altering site identity.

name: Analytics Agent
description: Measures traffic, conversions, and growth performance.
